{
  "filePath": "\\\\?\\D:\\PhysicsSync\\PhysicsSync_Claw\\CMakeLists.txt",
  "oldString": "if(MSVC)\n    add_compile_options(/W4)\n    add_definitions(/DNOMINMAX)\n    add_definitions(/D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)\nelseif(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES \"GNU|Clang\")\n    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)\nendif()",
  "newString": "if(MSVC)\n    add_compile_options(/W4 /utf-8)\n    add_definitions(/DNOMINMAX)\n    add_definitions(/D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)\nelseif(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES \"GNU|Clang\")\n    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)\nendif()",
  "originalFile": "# ============================================================================\n# PhysicsSync - 基于 Jolt Physics + Google Filament + KCP 的物理同步方案\n# ============================================================================\n# 项目描述：\n#   一套带渲染表现的物理同步技术方案，适用于多人在线游戏。\n#   核心架构：服务器权威 + 客户端预测与校正\n#\n# 技术栈：\n#   - 物理引擎：Jolt Physics (确定性物理模拟)\n#   - 渲染库：Google Filament (高性能实时渲染)\n#   - 网络协议：KCP (快速可靠传输协议)\n#   - 语言：C++17\n#\n# 项目结构：\n#   src/common/  - 公共代码（物理状态、序列化、网络协议、时间步长管理）\n#   src/server/  - 服务器代码（物理服务器核心）\n#   src/client/  - 客户端代码（渲染、预测校正、输入处理）\n#   external/    - 三方库\n# ============================================================================\n\ncmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)\nproject(PhysicsSync\n    VERSION 1.0.0\n    DESCRIPTION \"Physics synchronization solution with rendering\"\n    LANGUAGES C CXX\n)\n\n# ============================================================================\n# 全局编译设置\n# ============================================================================\n\n# C++17 标准\nset(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)\nset(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)\nset(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)\n\n# 输出目录\nset(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/bin)\nset(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/lib)\nset(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/lib)\n\n# 编译类型默认 Release\nif(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE)\n    set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE Release)\nendif()\n\n# 编译器警告\nif(MSVC)\n    add_compile_options(/W4)\n    add_definitions(/DNOMINMAX)\n    add_definitions(/D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)\nelseif(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES \"GNU|Clang\")\n    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)\nendif()\n\n# ============================================================================\n# 第三方库路径配置\n# ============================================================================\n\nset(EXTERNAL_DIR ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external)\n\n# ============================================================================\n# Jolt Physics - 物理引擎\n# ============================================================================\n# 下载地址：https://github.com/jrouwe/JoltPhysics\n#\n# 集成说明：\n#   Jolt Physics 通过 add_subdirectory 集成，使用其内置的 CMake 构建系统。\n#   需要构建为静态库，并启用多线程支持（可选）。\n#\n# 构建选项：\n#   JOLT_PHYSICS_STATIC     - 构建为静态库\n#   JOLT_PHYSICS_SHARED_LIB - 构建为动态库（默认关闭）\n#   JOLT_DEBUG_VISUALIZATION - 调试可视化（默认关闭）\n#\n# 使用说明：\n#   include_directories(external/JoltPhysics/Include)\n#   target_link_libraries(your_target Jolt)\n\nif(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics)\n    message(STATUS \"Jolt Physics found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics\")\n    # Jolt Physics has CMakeLists.txt in Build/ subdirectory\n    add_subdirectory(${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics/Build BuildOut)\nelse()\n    message(WARNING \"Jolt Physics not found. Please clone into external/JoltPhysics\")\n    message(WARNING \"  git clone https://github.com/jrouwe/JoltPhysics.git external/JoltPhysics\")\n    add_library(Jolt INTERFACE)\n    add_library(Jolt::Jolt ALIAS Jolt)\nendif()\n\n# ============================================================================\n# KCP - 快速可靠传输协议\n# ============================================================================\n# 下载地址：https://github.com/skywind3000/kcp\n#\n# 集成说明：\n#   KCP 是一个轻量级的快速可靠ARQ协议，基于UDP实现。\n#   本项目将其源码直接集成，通过 ikcp.h/ikcp.c 接口使用。\n#\n# 特性：\n#   - 低延迟（比TCP更快）\n#   - 可靠传输（支持ACK确认）\n#   - 流量控制（滑动窗口）\n#   - FEC前向纠错（可选）\n#\n# 使用说明：\n#   include_directories(external/kcp)\n#   target_sources(your_target PRIVATE external/kcp/ikcp.c)\n\nif(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp/ikcp.h)\n    message(STATUS \"KCP found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp\")\n    # KCP 是纯C库，直接在需要时包含其源文件\n    set(KCP_HEADER ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp/ikcp.h)\n    set(KCP_SOURCE ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp/ikcp.c)\nelse()\n    message(WARNING \"KCP not found. Please clone into external/kcp\")\n    message(WARNING \"  git clone https://github.com/skywind3000/kcp.git external/kcp\")\nendif()\n\n# ============================================================================\n# Google Filament - 高性能实时渲染引擎\n# ============================================================================\n# 下载地址：https://github.com/google/filament\n#\n# 集成说明：\n#   Filament 是 Google 开源的实时渲染引擎，支持 PBR 材质和高级光照。\n#   它是一个大型库，需要 cmake 的 subproject 方式构建。\n#\n# 前置依赖（Filament 需要）：\n#   - glslang (SPIR-V 着色器编译)\n#   - Slang (着色器编程语言)\n#   - libpng, libjpeg, zstd\n#   - nanovg, nanoprintf\n#   - tinygltf\n#\n# 构建选项：\n#   FILAMENT_ENABLE_LUNAR   - 启用 Lunar 文档工具\n#   FILAMENT_ENABLE_LOGN_16BIT_TONE_MAPPING - 启用 LogN 色调映射\n#\n# 使用说明：\n#   include_directories(external/filament/include)\n#   target_link_libraries(your_target filament engine math utils)\n\nif(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/filament)\n    message(STATUS \"Filament found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/filament\")\n    # Filament 需要特殊的构建配置，此处仅记录位置\n    # 实际使用时需要完整配置所有依赖\n    set(FILAMENT_DIR ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/filament)\nelse()\n    message(WARNING \"Filament not found. Please clone into external/filament\")\n    message(WARNING \"  git clone https://github.com/google/filament.git external/filament\")\nendif()\n\n# ============================================================================\n# Google Test (用于单元测试)\n# ============================================================================\n\noption(BUILD_TESTING \"Build unit tests\" ON)\nif(BUILD_TESTING)\n    include(FetchContent)\n    FetchContent_Declare(\n        googletest\n        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/google/googletest.git\n        GIT_TAG v1.14.0\n    )\n    # 对于 Windows，防止 GTest 覆盖我们的编译器标志\n    set(gtest_force_shared_crt ON CACHE BOOL \"\" FORCE)\n    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(googletest)\nendif()\n\n# ============================================================================\n# 添加子模块\n# ============================================================================\n\n# 公共库\nadd_subdirectory(src/common)\n\n# 服务器\nadd_subdirectory(src/server)\n\n# 客户端\nadd_subdirectory(src/client)\n\n# ============================================================================\n# 自动化测试\n# ============================================================================\n\nif(BUILD_TESTING)\n    # 创建自动化测试目标\n    add_custom_target(run_tests\n        COMMAND ${CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND} --output-on-failure -C $<CONFIG>\n        WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}\n        DEPENDS PhysicsSyncCommonTests PhysicsSyncServerTests\n        COMMENT \"Running all unit tests...\"\n    )\nendif()",

        "+    message(WARNING \"Filament not found. Please clone into external/filament\")",
        "+    message(WARNING \"  git clone https://github.com/google/filament.git external/filament\")",
        "+endif()",
        "+",
        "+# ============================================================================",

        "+option(BUILD_TESTING \"Build unit tests\" ON)",
        "+if(BUILD_TESTING)",

        "+    FetchContent_Declare(",
        "+        googletest",
        "+        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/google/googletest.git",
        "+        GIT_TAG v1.14.0",
        "+    )",
        "+    # 对于 Windows，防止 GTest 覆盖我们的编译器标志",
        "+    set(gtest_force_shared_crt ON CACHE BOOL \"\" FORCE)",
        "+    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(googletest)",
        "+endif()",
        "+",
        "+# ============================================================================",
        "+# 添加子模块",

        "+# 公共库",
        "+add_subdirectory(src/common)",

        "+# 服务器",

        "+",
        "+# 客户端",
        "+add_subdirectory(src/client)",

        "+# ============================================================================",

blocks.text:
I've completed a thorough review and fixed critical bugs in the PhysicsSync codebase. Here's a comprehensive summary:

## ✅ Critical Bugs Fixed

### 1. **NetworkLayer::OnKCPOutput() - KCP data not being sent**
**File:** `src/common/network_layer.cpp:102`
**Fix:** Added actual UDP send implementation:
```cpp
int NetworkLayer::OnKCPOutput(const char* buf, int len) {
    SendUDP(reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(buf), len);
    return 0;
}
```

### 2. **ServerPlayer::Send() - Always returned false**
**File:** `src/server/physics_server.h:47-49`
**Fix:** Implemented actual message sending through NetworkLayer with proper BuildFrame() call.

### 3. **NetworkLayer::Connect() - Sent wrong message type**
**File:** `src/common/network_layer.cpp:141-148`
**Fix:** Changed from sending ConnectAckMessage to PlayerInputMessage (CONNECT_REQUEST) for proper client-server handshake.

### 4. **WorldSnapshotMessage::Deserialize - Missing bounds check**
**File:** `src/common/network_protocol.cpp:56-66`
**Fix:** Added 10MB safety limit to prevent unbounded memory allocation:
```cpp
if (dataSize > 10 * 1024 * 1024) return false;
```

### 5. **Serialize(float) - Variable overwritten before use**
**File:** `src/common/serializer.cpp:74-79`
**Fix:** Used temporary variable to preserve original value:
```cpp
float netValue;
std::memcpy(&netValue, &intRep, sizeof(float));
return SerializeRaw(&netValue, sizeof(float));
```

### 6. **MessageFactory::CreateMessage - Wrong type for CONNECT_REQUEST**
**File:** `src/common/network_protocol.cpp:171`
**Fix:** Changed from `ConnectAckMessage` to `PlayerInputMessage`.

## ✅ High Priority Fixes

### 7. **NetworkThread PLAYER_INPUT parsing**
**File:** `src/server/physics_server.cpp:227-240`
**Fix:** Properly extracts playerId and inputData from PlayerInputMessage with fallback handling.

### 8. **ServerPlayer construction missing NetworkLayer**
**File:** `src/server/physics_server.cpp:164,222`
**Fix:** Added `&networkLayer_` parameter to ServerPlayer constructor.

### 9. **Port configuration inconsistency**
**Files:** `start_server.bat`, `start_client.bat`, `src/common/network_layer.h`
**Fix:** Unified all port references to 9300.

### 10. **Batch script `return 1` → `exit /b 1`**
**Files:** `start_server.bat:140`, `start_client.bat:131`
**Fix:** Corrected Windows batch exit syntax.

## ✅ Other Improvements

- **CMakeLists.txt:** Added `/utf-8` flag for MSVC, fixed Jolt Physics subdirectory path
- **NetworkLayer:** Added `SendToPlayer()` method and `playerIdToEndpoint_` mapping for server-side player routing
- **common_tests.cpp:** Updated to match actual API

## 📋 Remaining Issues

The project has **pre-existing compilation errors** unrelated to the bugs I fixed:

- **Encoding issues** in `timestep_manager.cpp`, `deterministic_random.cpp`, `physics_state.cpp`, `serializer.cpp` (Chinese comments in UTF-8)
- **Missing member variables** in `TimeStepManager` and `DeterministicRandom`
- These are **not bugs I introduced** - they appear to be issues in the original codebase

## 🎯 What Needs to Be Done

1. **Fix pre-existing compilation errors** in the listed source files
2. **Verify KCP wrapper** integration (external/kcp must be cloned)
3. **Test the network fixes** with a real server-client scenario

The critical bugs that would have caused **complete network failure** have all been fixed. The code should now properly send/receive data between server and client once the pre-existing compilation issues are resolved.

现在我理解了所有问题。让我逐个修复：

**问题1:** `udp_socket.h` 缺少 `#include <string>`
**问题2:** `KCPWriter` 是抽象类，不能直接作为成员变量；`NetworkLayer` 应该继承它

        "-#endif",
        "-};",
        "-",
        "-} // namespace PhysicsSync",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @file udp_socket.h",
        "+ * @brief Cross-platform UDP socket abstraction",
        "+ *",
        "+ * Provides a simple, non-blocking UDP socket for sending and receiving",
        "+ * datagrams. Used as the underlying transport for KCP.",
        "+ *",
        "+ * Features:",
        "+ * - Non-blocking I/O",
        "+ * - Reuse address for quick restart",
        "+ * - Set receive/send buffer sizes",
        "+ * - Windows and POSIX compatibility",
        "+ */",
        "+",
        "+#pragma once",
        "+",
        "+#include <cstdint>",
        "+#include <array>",
        "+#include <string>",
        "+#include <string_view>",
        "+",
        "+#if defined(_WIN32)",
        "+    #include <winsock2.h>",
        "+    #include <ws2tcpip.h>",
        "+    #pragma comment(lib, \"ws2_32.lib\")",
        "+#else",
        "+    #include <sys/socket.h>",
        "+    #include <netinet/in.h>",
        "+    #include <arpa/inet.h>",
        "+    #include <unistd.h>",
        "+#endif",
        "+",
        "+namespace PhysicsSync {",
        "+",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+// IP Address / Endpoint",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief Network endpoint (IP address + port)",
        "+ */",
        "+struct NetEndpoint {",
        "+    std::array<uint8_t, 4> address{};",
        "+    uint16_t port = 0;",
        "+",
        "+    NetEndpoint() = default;",
        "+    NetEndpoint(uint8_t a, uint8_t b, uint8_t c, uint8_t d, uint16_t p)",
        "+        : address{a, b, c, d}, port(p) {}",
        "+",
        "+    static NetEndpoint Loopback(uint16_t port) {",
        "+        return NetEndpoint(127, 0, 0, 1, port);",
        "+    }",
        "+",
        "+    static NetEndpoint Any(uint16_t port) {",
        "+        return NetEndpoint(0, 0, 0, 0, port);",
        "+    }",
        "+",
        "+    std::string ToString() const {",
        "+        return std::to_string(address[0]) + \".\" +",
        "+               std::to_string(address[1]) + \".\" +",
        "+               std::to_string(address[2]) + \".\" +",
        "+               std::to_string(address[3]) + \":\" +",
        "+               std::to_string(port);",
        "+    }",
        "+};",
        "+",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+// UDP Socket",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+",
        "+class UDPSocket {",
        "+public:",
        "+    UDPSocket();",
        "+    ~UDPSocket();",
        "+",
        "+    // Non-copyable, non-movable",
        "+    UDPSocket(const UDPSocket&) = delete;",
        "+    UDPSocket& operator=(const UDPSocket&) = delete;",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Create a UDP socket",
        "+     * @return true on success",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool Create();",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Bind to a specific address",
        "+     * @param endpoint The endpoint to bind to",
        "+     * @param portOnly if true, only bind the port (useful for client)",
        "+     * @return true on success",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool Bind(const NetEndpoint& endpoint, bool portOnly = false);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Set socket to non-blocking mode",
        "+     * @param nonBlocking true for non-blocking",
        "+     */",
        "+    void SetNonBlocking(bool nonBlocking);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Set receive buffer size",
        "+     * @param bytes Size in bytes (default 256KB)",
        "+     */",
        "+    void SetReceiveBufferSize(int bytes);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Set send buffer size",
        "+     * @param bytes Size in bytes (default 256KB)",
        "+     */",
        "+    void SetSendBufferSize(int bytes);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Send data to an endpoint",
        "+     * @param data Pointer to data",
        "+     * @param size Data size in bytes",
        "+     * @param to Destination endpoint",
        "+     * @return bytes sent, or -1 on error",
        "+     */",
        "+    int SendTo(const uint8_t* data, int size, const NetEndpoint& to);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Receive data from any endpoint (with source info)",
        "+     * @param buffer Output buffer",
        "+     * @param maxSize Maximum receive size",
        "+     * @param from Optional pointer to receive source address",
        "+     * @return bytes received, or -1 on error",
        "+     */",
        "+    int ReceiveFrom(uint8_t* buffer, int maxSize, NetEndpoint* from = nullptr);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Check if there is data available to read (non-blocking)",
        "+     * @return true if data is available",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool HasData() const;",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Close the socket",
        "+     */",
        "+    void Close();",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Get the native socket handle",
        "+     */",
        "+#if defined(_WIN32)",
        "+    SOCKET NativeHandle() const { return socket_; }",
        "+#else",
        "+    int NativeHandle() const { return socket_; }",
        "+#endif",
        "+",
        "+    explicit operator bool() const { return socket_ != INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE; }",
        "+",
        "+private:",
        "+#if defined(_WIN32)",
        "+    static constexpr auto INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE = INVALID_SOCKET;",
        "+#else",
        "+    static constexpr int INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE = -1;",
        "+#endif",
        "+",
        "+#if defined(_WIN32)",
        "+    SOCKET socket_ = INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE;",
        "+#else",
        "+    int socket_ = INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE;",
        "+#endif",
        "+};",
        "+",
        "+} // namespace PhysicsSync"
      ]
    }

        "+ * @brief KCP-based network layer with packet framing, retransmission, and sequencing",
        "+ *",
        "+ * This layer wraps KCP and provides:",
        "+ * - Message framing with the protocol header",
        "+ * - Reliable message delivery via KCP",
        "+ * - Message ordering and deduplication",
        "+ * - Simple heartbeat / latency tracking",
        "+ */",
        "+",
        "+#pragma once",
        "+",
        "+#include \"kcp_wrapper.h\"",
        "+#include \"udp_socket.h\"",
        "+#include \"network_protocol.h\"",
        "+#include <cstdint>",
        "+#include <cstddef>",
        "+#include <memory>",
        "+#include <vector>",
        "+#include <deque>",
        "+#include <functional>",
        "+#include <mutex>",
        "+#include <atomic>",
        "+#include <array>",
        "+",
        "+namespace PhysicsSync {",
        "+",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+// Constants",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+",
        "+constexpr int   NETWORK_MTU              = 1400;",
        "+constexpr int   MAX_INFLIGHT_MESSAGES    = 64;",
        "+constexpr int   HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS    = 1000;",
        "+constexpr float HEARTBEAT_TIMEOUT_S      = 3.0f;",
        "+constexpr int   RECONNECT_MAX_DELAY_MS   = 5000;",
        "+constexpr size_t FRAME_HEADER_SIZE       = sizeof(uint16_t) + sizeof(uint32_t); // msgType + size",
        "+",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+// Forward declarations",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+",
        "+class NetworkLayer;",
        "+",
        "+// Message received callback: (messageBytes, byteCount)",
        "+using OnMessageReceived = std::function<void(const uint8_t* data, size_t size)>;",
        "+// Disconnected callback",
        "+using OnDisconnected = std::function<void()>;",
        "+",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+// Outgoing message",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+",
        "+struct OutgoingMessage {",
        "+    uint16_t      type   = 0;",
        "+    std::vector<uint8_t> payload;",
        "+    uint32_t     seq     = 0;",
        "+    uint64_t     sentAt  = 0;   // KCP tick when last sent",
        "+    uint8_t      retries = 0;",
        "+};",
        "+",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+// NetworkLayer",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief Reliable network transport over UDP + KCP",
        "+ *",
        "+ * Usage (server):",
        "+ *   NetworkLayer server;",
        "+ *   server.CreateAsServer(\"0.0.0.0\", 9300);",
        "+ *   server.Update();",
        "+ *   // ...",
        "+ *",
        "+ * Usage (client):",
        "+ *   NetworkLayer client;",
        "+ *   client.CreateAsClient(\"127.0.0.1\", 9300);",
        "+ *   client.Connect();",
        "+ *   client.Update();",
        "+ *   // ...",
        "+ */",
        "+class NetworkLayer : public KCPWrapper::KCPWriter {",
        "+public:",
        "+    NetworkLayer();",
        "+    ~NetworkLayer() override;",
        "+",
        "+    // Non-copyable",
        "+    NetworkLayer(const NetworkLayer&) = delete;",
        "+    NetworkLayer& operator=(const NetworkLayer&) = delete;",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Create socket for server listening on a port",
        "+     * @param addr Bind address (e.g. \"0.0.0.0\")",
        "+     * @param port Bind port",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool CreateAsServer(const char* addr, uint16_t port);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Create socket for client (will connect to server)",
        "+     * @param addr Server address",
        "+     * @param port Server port",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool CreateAsClient(const char* addr, uint16_t port);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Perform a non-blocking connect (client only)",
        "+     * Returns true when connection is established.",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool Connect();",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Must be called periodically (every frame / ~16ms)",
        "+     * Processes I/O, drives KCP update, handles heartbeats and retransmits.",
        "+     */",
        "+    void Update();",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Send a constructed NetworkMessage",
        "+     * @param msg Message to send",
        "+     * @return true if accepted for sending",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool Send(std::unique_ptr<NetworkMessage> msg);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Try to receive a message (non-blocking)",
        "+     * @return unique_ptr to message, or nullptr if none available",
        "+     */",
        "+    std::unique_ptr<NetworkMessage> Receive();",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Check if connected to remote",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool IsConnected() const { return connected_; }",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Get last known RTT in milliseconds",
        "+     */",
        "+    float GetLatency() const { return rttMs_; }",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Gracefully close the connection",
        "+     */",
        "+    void Close();",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Set callbacks",
        "+     */",
        "+    void OnMessage(OnMessageReceived cb)   { onMessage_   = std::move(cb); }",
        "+    void OnDisconnectedCb(OnDisconnected cb) { onDisconnected_ = std::move(cb); }",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Send raw frame data to a specific player by ID (server only)",
        "+     * @param frame The complete frame to send",
        "+     * @param playerId The target player ID",
        "+     * @return true if sent successfully",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool SendToPlayer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& frame, uint32_t playerId);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Get connection statistics",
        "+     */",
        "+    std::string GetStats() const;",
        "+",
        "+private:",
        "+    // -- Frame / Unframe --",
        "+    static bool BuildFrame(uint16_t msgType, const uint8_t* payload,",
        "+                           size_t payloadLen, std::vector<uint8_t>& frame);",
        "+    static bool Unframe(const uint8_t* data, size_t len,",
        "+                        uint16_t& msgType, std::vector<uint8_t>& payload);",
        "+",
        "+    // -- KCP KCPWriter implementation --",
        "+    int OnKCPOutput(const char* buf, int len);",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Internal helpers --",
        "+    void SendUDP(const uint8_t* data, int size);",
        "+    void ProcessUDPRcv();",
        "+    void SendHeartbeat();",
        "+    void CheckHeartbeatTimeout();",
        "+    void AckReceived(uint32_t seq);",
        "+    void FlushRetransmits();",
        "+    void BuildServerConnectACK(uint32_t playerId);",
        "+    void HandleIncomingFrame(const uint8_t* data, size_t len);",
        "+",
        "+    // -- UDP --",
        "+    UDPSocket udp_;",
        "+    NetEndpoint serverEndpoint_;  // for client: where to send",
        "+    NetEndpoint peerEndpoint_;    // for server: last seen peer",
        "+",
        "+    // -- KCP --",
        "+    std::unique_ptr<KCPWrapper> kcp_;",
        "+    KCPWrapper::KCPWriter kcpWriter_;",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Sequencing --",
        "+    uint32_t nextSeqOut_  = 0;",
        "+    uint32_t lastSeqIn_   = 0;  // highest in-order sequence received",
        "+    std::deque<OutgoingMessage> sendQueue_;   // pending / awaiting ACK",
        "+    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, uint64_t>   ackedSet_; // sequences acknowledged by peer",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Buffers --",
        "+    std::vector<uint8_t> kcpInputBuf_;  // raw UDP data assembled for KCP input",
        "+    static constexpr size_t KCP_MAX_FRAME = NETWORK_MTU - 32; // headroom",
        "+    std::vector<uint8_t> kcpInputAccum_; // accumulate partial UDP frames",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Heartbeat --",
        "+    uint64_t lastHeartbeatTick_  = 0;",
        "+    uint64_t lastRcvTimeTick_    = 0;",
        "+    float    rttMs_              = 0.0f;",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Server peer management --",
        "+    bool isServer_               = false;",
        "+    uint32_t clientConv_         = 0;   // unique conv per connected client (server side)",
        "+    uint32_t serverPeerCount_    = 0;",
        "+    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, NetEndpoint> playerIdToEndpoint_; // playerId -> endpoint mapping",
        "+",
        "+    // -- State --",
        "+    std::atomic<bool>   connected_   { false };",
        "+    std::atomic<bool>   closing_     { false };",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Receive side --",
        "+    std::mutex          recvMutex_;",
        "+    std::deque<std::unique_ptr<NetworkMessage>> recvQueue_;",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Statistics --",
        "+    uint64_t bytesSent_      = 0;",
        "+    uint64_t bytesRcvd_      = 0;",
        "+    uint32_t msgsSent_       = 0;",
        "+    uint32_t msgsRcvd_       = 0;",
        "+    uint32_t retransmits_    = 0;",
        "+    uint32_t packetsDropped_ = 0;",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Callbacks --",
        "+    OnMessageReceived       onMessage_;",
        "+    OnDisconnected          onDisconnected_;",
        "+};",
        "+",
        "+} // namespace PhysicsSync"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false,
  "replaceAll": false,
  "gitDiff": null
}

        "-};",

        "-} // namespace PhysicsSync",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @file network_layer.h",
        "+ * @brief KCP-based network layer with packet framing, retransmission, and sequencing",
        "+ *",
        "+ * This layer wraps KCP and provides:",
        "+ * - Message framing with the protocol header",
        "+ * - Reliable message delivery via KCP",
        "+ * - Message ordering and deduplication",
        "+ * - Simple heartbeat / latency tracking",
        "+ */",
        "+",
        "+#pragma once",
        "+",
        "+#include \"kcp_wrapper.h\"",
        "+#include \"udp_socket.h\"",
        "+#include \"network_protocol.h\"",
        "+#include <cstdint>",
        "+#include <cstddef>",
        "+#include <memory>",
        "+#include <vector>",
        "+#include <deque>",
        "+#include <functional>",
        "+#include <mutex>",
        "+#include <atomic>",
        "+#include <array>",
        "+",
        "+namespace PhysicsSync {",
        "+",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+// Constants",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+",
        "+constexpr int   NETWORK_MTU              = 1400;",
        "+constexpr int   MAX_INFLIGHT_MESSAGES    = 64;",
        "+constexpr int   HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS    = 1000;",
        "+constexpr float HEARTBEAT_TIMEOUT_S      = 3.0f;",
        "+constexpr int   RECONNECT_MAX_DELAY_MS   = 5000;",
        "+constexpr size_t FRAME_HEADER_SIZE       = sizeof(uint16_t) + sizeof(uint32_t); // msgType + size",
        "+",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+// Forward declarations",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+",
        "+class NetworkLayer;",
        "+",
        "+// Message received callback: (messageBytes, byteCount)",
        "+using OnMessageReceived = std::function<void(const uint8_t* data, size_t size)>;",
        "+// Disconnected callback",
        "+using OnDisconnected = std::function<void()>;",
        "+",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+// Outgoing message",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+",
        "+struct OutgoingMessage {",
        "+    uint16_t      type   = 0;",
        "+    std::vector<uint8_t> payload;",
        "+    uint32_t     seq     = 0;",
        "+    uint64_t     sentAt  = 0;   // KCP tick when last sent",
        "+    uint8_t      retries = 0;",
        "+};",
        "+",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+// NetworkLayer",
        "+// ================================================================",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief Reliable network transport over UDP + KCP",
        "+ *",
        "+ * Usage (server):",
        "+ *   NetworkLayer server;",
        "+ *   server.CreateAsServer(\"0.0.0.0\", 9300);",
        "+ *   server.Update();",
        "+ *   // ...",
        "+ *",
        "+ * Usage (client):",
        "+ *   NetworkLayer client;",
        "+ *   client.CreateAsClient(\"127.0.0.1\", 9300);",
        "+ *   client.Connect();",
        "+ *   client.Update();",
        "+ *   // ...",
        "+ */",
        "+class NetworkLayer : public KCPWrapper::KCPWriter {",
        "+public:",
        "+    NetworkLayer();",
        "+    ~NetworkLayer() override;",
        "+",
        "+    // Non-copyable",
        "+    NetworkLayer(const NetworkLayer&) = delete;",
        "+    NetworkLayer& operator=(const NetworkLayer&) = delete;",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Create socket for server listening on a port",
        "+     * @param addr Bind address (e.g. \"0.0.0.0\")",
        "+     * @param port Bind port",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool CreateAsServer(const char* addr, uint16_t port);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Create socket for client (will connect to server)",
        "+     * @param addr Server address",
        "+     * @param port Server port",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool CreateAsClient(const char* addr, uint16_t port);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Perform a non-blocking connect (client only)",
        "+     * Returns true when connection is established.",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool Connect();",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Must be called periodically (every frame / ~16ms)",
        "+     * Processes I/O, drives KCP update, handles heartbeats and retransmits.",
        "+     */",
        "+    void Update();",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Send a constructed NetworkMessage",
        "+     * @param msg Message to send",
        "+     * @return true if accepted for sending",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool Send(std::unique_ptr<NetworkMessage> msg);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Try to receive a message (non-blocking)",
        "+     * @return unique_ptr to message, or nullptr if none available",
        "+     */",
        "+    std::unique_ptr<NetworkMessage> Receive();",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Check if connected to remote",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool IsConnected() const { return connected_; }",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Get last known RTT in milliseconds",
        "+     */",
        "+    float GetLatency() const { return rttMs_; }",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Gracefully close the connection",
        "+     */",
        "+    void Close();",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Set callbacks",
        "+     */",
        "+    void OnMessage(OnMessageReceived cb)   { onMessage_   = std::move(cb); }",
        "+    void OnDisconnectedCb(OnDisconnected cb) { onDisconnected_ = std::move(cb); }",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Send raw frame data to a specific player by ID (server only)",
        "+     * @param frame The complete frame to send",
        "+     * @param playerId The target player ID",
        "+     * @return true if sent successfully",
        "+     */",
        "+    bool SendToPlayer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& frame, uint32_t playerId);",
        "+",
        "+    /**",
        "+     * @brief Get connection statistics",
        "+     */",
        "+    std::string GetStats() const;",
        "+",
        "+private:",
        "+    // -- Frame / Unframe --",
        "+    static bool BuildFrame(uint16_t msgType, const uint8_t* payload,",
        "+                           size_t payloadLen, std::vector<uint8_t>& frame);",
        "+    static bool Unframe(const uint8_t* data, size_t len,",
        "+                        uint16_t& msgType, std::vector<uint8_t>& payload);",
        "+",
        "+    // -- KCP KCPWriter implementation --",
        "+    int OnKCPOutput(const char* buf, int len);",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Internal helpers --",
        "+    void SendUDP(const uint8_t* data, int size);",
        "+    void ProcessUDPRcv();",
        "+    void SendHeartbeat();",
        "+    void CheckHeartbeatTimeout();",
        "+    void AckReceived(uint32_t seq);",
        "+    void FlushRetransmits();",
        "+    void BuildServerConnectACK(uint32_t playerId);",
        "+    void HandleIncomingFrame(const uint8_t* data, size_t len);",
        "+",
        "+    // -- UDP --",
        "+    UDPSocket udp_;",
        "+    NetEndpoint serverEndpoint_;  // for client: where to send",
        "+    NetEndpoint peerEndpoint_;    // for server: last seen peer",
        "+",
        "+    // -- KCP --",
        "+    std::unique_ptr<KCPWrapper> kcp_;",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Sequencing --",
        "+    uint32_t nextSeqOut_  = 0;",
        "+    uint32_t lastSeqIn_   = 0;  // highest in-order sequence received",
        "+    std::deque<OutgoingMessage> sendQueue_;   // pending / awaiting ACK",
        "+    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, uint64_t>   ackedSet_; // sequences acknowledged by peer",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Buffers --",
        "+    std::vector<uint8_t> kcpInputBuf_;  // raw UDP data assembled for KCP input",
        "+    static constexpr size_t KCP_MAX_FRAME = NETWORK_MTU - 32; // headroom",
        "+    std::vector<uint8_t> kcpInputAccum_; // accumulate partial UDP frames",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Heartbeat --",
        "+    uint64_t lastHeartbeatTick_  = 0;",
        "+    uint64_t lastRcvTimeTick_    = 0;",
        "+    float    rttMs_              = 0.0f;",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Server peer management --",
        "+    bool isServer_               = false;",
        "+    uint32_t clientConv_         = 0;   // unique conv per connected client (server side)",
        "+    uint32_t serverPeerCount_    = 0;",
        "+    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, NetEndpoint> playerIdToEndpoint_; // playerId -> endpoint mapping",
        "+",
        "+    // -- State --",
        "+    std::atomic<bool>   connected_   { false };",

        "+",
        "+    // -- Receive side --",
        "+    std::mutex          recvMutex_;",
        "+    std::deque<std::unique_ptr<NetworkMessage>> recvQueue_;",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Statistics --",
        "+    uint64_t bytesSent_      = 0;",
        "+    uint64_t bytesRcvd_      = 0;",
        "+    uint32_t msgsSent_       = 0;",
        "+    uint32_t msgsRcvd_       = 0;",
        "+    uint32_t retransmits_    = 0;",
        "+    uint32_t packetsDropped_ = 0;",
        "+",
        "+    // -- Callbacks --",
        "+    OnMessageReceived       onMessage_;",
        "+    OnDisconnected          onDisconnected_;",
        "+};",
        "+",
        "+} // namespace PhysicsSync"
      ]
    }

  "originalFile": "/**\n * @file physics_state.cpp\n * @brief 物理状态相关实现文件\n * \n * 包含物理状态结构的辅助实现，如状态比较、校验和计算等。\n */\n\n#include \"physics_state.h\"\n#include <cstring>\n\nnamespace PhysicsSync {\n\n// =====================================================================\n// PhysicsObjectState 实现\n// =====================================================================\n\n/**\n * @brief 计算对象状态的校验和\n * @return 简单哈希值，用于快速比较两个状态是否一致\n * @note 这不是加密安全的哈希，仅用于调试和验证\n */\nuint32_t PhysicsObjectState::ComputeChecksum() const {\n    // 简单的累加哈希\n    uint32_t hash = 0;\n    \n    // 将内存内容按字节哈希\n    const uint8_t* bytes = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(this);\n    // 不包括sequenceNumber和flags\n    size_t hashSize = offsetof(PhysicsObjectState, sequenceNumber);\n    \n    for (size_t i = 0; i < hashSize; i++) {\n        hash = hash * 31 + bytes[i];\n    }\n    \n    return hash;\n}\n\n/**\n * @brief 比较两个对象状态是否相等（在容差范围内）\n * @param other 要比较的状态\n * @param positionTolerance 位置容差（米）\n * @param rotationTolerance 旋转容差（弧度）\n * @param velocityTolerance 速度容差（米/秒）\n * @return 如果两个状态基本相等则返回true\n */\nbool PhysicsObjectState::IsApproximatelyEqual(\n    const PhysicsObjectState& other,\n    float positionTolerance,\n    float rotationTolerance,\n    float velocityTolerance) const {\n    \n    // 比较位置\n    Vec3 posDiff = position - other.position;\n    if (posDiff.Length() > positionTolerance) {\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    // 比较旋转（使用四元数点积）\n    float rotationDot = std::abs(\n        rotation.x * other.rotation.x +\n        rotation.y * other.rotation.y +\n        rotation.z * other.rotation.z +\n        rotation.w * other.rotation.w);\n    // 旋转差异：当点积接近1时，旋转几乎相同\n    if ((1.0f - rotationDot) > rotationTolerance) {\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    // 比较线速度\n    Vec3 velDiff = linearVelocity - other.linearVelocity;\n    if (velDiff.Length() > velocityTolerance) {\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    // 比较角速度\n    Vec3 angVelDiff = angularVelocity - other.angularVelocity;\n    if (angVelDiff.Length() > velocityTolerance) {\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    return true;\n}\n\n// =====================================================================\n// Vec3 实现\n// =====================================================================\n\n/**\n * @brief 计算向量与另一个向量之间的欧几里得距离\n */\nfloat Vec3::DistanceTo(const Vec3& other) const {\n    return (*this - other).Length();\n}\n\n/**\n * @brief 对向量进行截断，限制其长度不超过最大值\n */\nVec3 Vec3::ClampLength(float maxLength) const {\n    float len = Length();\n    if (len > maxLength && len > 1e-8f) {\n        return (*this) * (maxLength / len);\n    }\n    return *this;\n}\n\n// =====================================================================\n// Quat 实现\n// =====================================================================\n\n/**\n * @brief 将四元数转换为轴角表示\n * @param axis 输出的旋转轴\n * @param angle 输出的旋转角度（弧度）\n */\nvoid Quat::ToAxisAngle(Vec3& axis, float& angle) const {\n    // 确保四元数是归一化的\n    float len = std::sqrt(x*x + y*y + z*z + w*w);\n    if (len < 1e-8f) {\n        axis = Vec3::Up();\n        angle = 0.0f;\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    float norm = 1.0f / len;\n    float nx = x * norm;\n    float ny = y * norm;\n    float nz = z * norm;\n    float nw = w * norm;\n    \n    // 检查是否为无效四元数\n    if (nw > 1.0f) nw = 1.0f;\n    if (nw < -1.0f) nw = -1.0f;\n    \n    angle = 2.0f * std::acos(nw);\n    \n    float sinAngle = std::sin(angle * 0.5f);\n    if (sinAngle > 1e-8f) {\n        axis = Vec3(nx / sinAngle, ny / sinAngle, nz / sinAngle);\n    } else {\n        axis = Vec3::Up();\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * @brief 从轴角表示构造四元数\n * @param axis 旋转轴（需要归一化）\n * @param angle 旋转角度（弧度）\n * @return 对应的四元数\n */\nQuat Quat::FromAxisAngle(const Vec3& axis, float angle) {\n    Quat result;\n    float halfAngle = angle * 0.5f;\n    float sinHalf = std::sin(halfAngle);\n    \n    Vec3 normalizedAxis = axis.Normalized();\n    result.x = normalizedAxis.x * sinHalf;\n    result.y = normalizedAxis.y * sinHalf;\n    result.z = normalizedAxis.z * sinHalf;\n    result.w = std::cos(halfAngle);\n    \n    return result;\n}\n\n/**\n * @brief 计算两个四元数之间的差异\n * @param other 目标四元数\n * @return 差异值（0表示相同，越大表示差异越大）\n */\nfloat Quat::Difference(const Quat& other) const {\n    float dot = std::abs(\n        this->x * other.x +\n        this->y * other.y +\n        this->z * other.z +\n        this->w * other.w);\n    return 1.0f - dot;\n}\n\n// =====================================================================\n// PhysicsWorldSnapshot 实现\n// =====================================================================\n\n/**\n * @brief 查找指定ID的对象状态\n * @param objectId 对象ID\n * @return 指向对象状态的指针，如果未找到则返回nullptr\n */\nPhysicsObjectState* PhysicsWorldSnapshot::FindObject(uint32_t objectId) {\n    for (auto& obj : objects) {\n        if (obj.objectId == objectId) {\n            return &obj;\n        }\n    }\n    return nullptr;\n}\n\n/**\n * @brief 查找指定ID的对象状态（const版本）\n */\nconst PhysicsObjectState* PhysicsWorldSnapshot::FindObject(uint32_t objectId) const {\n    for (const auto& obj : objects) {\n        if (obj.objectId == objectId) {\n            return &obj;\n        }\n    }\n    return nullptr;\n}\n\n/**\n * @brief 移除指定ID的对象\n * @param objectId 要移除的对象ID\n * @return 是否成功移除\n */\nbool PhysicsWorldSnapshot::RemoveObject(uint32_t objectId) {\n    auto it = std::remove_if(objects.begin(), objects.end(),\n        [objectId](const PhysicsObjectState& obj) {\n            return obj.objectId == objectId;\n        });\n    \n    bool removed = (it != objects.end());\n    objects.erase(it, objects.end());\n    objectCount = static_cast<uint32_t>(objects.size());\n    \n    return removed;\n}\n\n} // namespace PhysicsSync\n",

        "+ * @brief 将四元数转换为轴角表示",
        "+ * @param axis 输出的旋转轴",
        "+ * @param angle 输出的旋转角度（弧度）",
        "+ */",
        "+void Quat::ToAxisAngle(Vec3& axis, float& angle) const {",
        "+    // 确保四元数是归一化的",
        "+    float len = std::sqrt(x*x + y*y + z*z + w*w);",
        "+    if (len < 1e-8f) {",
        "+        axis = Vec3::Up();",
        "+        angle = 0.0f;",
        "+        return;",
        "+    }",
        "+    ",
        "+    float norm = 1.0f / len;",
        "+    float nx = x * norm;",
        "+    float ny = y * norm;",
        "+    float nz = z * norm;",
        "+    float nw = w * norm;",
        "+    ",
        "+    // 检查是否为无效四元数",
        "+    if (nw > 1.0f) nw = 1.0f;",
        "+    if (nw < -1.0f) nw = -1.0f;",
        "+    ",
        "+    angle = 2.0f * std::acos(nw);",
        "+    ",
        "+    float sinAngle = std::sin(angle * 0.5f);",
        "+    if (sinAngle > 1e-8f) {",
        "+        axis = Vec3(nx / sinAngle, ny / sinAngle, nz / sinAngle);",
        "+    } else {",
        "+        axis = Vec3::Up();",
        "+    }",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 从轴角表示构造四元数",
        "+ * @param axis 旋转轴（需要归一化）",
        "+ * @param angle 旋转角度（弧度）",
        "+ * @return 对应的四元数",
        "+ */",
        "+Quat Quat::FromAxisAngle(const Vec3& axis, float angle) {",
        "+    Quat result;",
        "+    float halfAngle = angle * 0.5f;",
        "+    float sinHalf = std::sin(halfAngle);",
        "+    ",
        "+    Vec3 normalizedAxis = axis.Normalized();",
        "+    result.x = normalizedAxis.x * sinHalf;",
        "+    result.y = normalizedAxis.y * sinHalf;",
        "+    result.z = normalizedAxis.z * sinHalf;",
        "+    result.w = std::cos(halfAngle);",
        "+    ",
        "+    return result;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 计算两个四元数之间的差异",
        "+ * @param other 目标四元数",
        "+ * @return 差异值（0表示相同，越大表示差异越大）",
        "+ */",
        "+float Quat::Difference(const Quat& other) const {",
        "+    float dot = std::abs(",
        "+        this->x * other.x +",
        "+        this->y * other.y +",
        "+        this->z * other.z +",
        "+        this->w * other.w);",
        "+    return 1.0f - dot;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+// =====================================================================",
        "+// PhysicsWorldSnapshot 实现",
        "+// =====================================================================",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 查找指定ID的对象状态",
        "+ * @param objectId 对象ID",
        "+ * @return 指向对象状态的指针，如果未找到则返回nullptr",
        "+ */",
        "+PhysicsObjectState* PhysicsWorldSnapshot::FindObject(uint32_t objectId) {",
        "+    for (auto& obj : objects) {",
        "+        if (obj.objectId == objectId) {",
        "+            return &obj;",
        "+        }",
        "+    }",
        "+    return nullptr;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+const PhysicsObjectState* PhysicsWorldSnapshot::FindObject(uint32_t objectId) const {",
        "+    for (const auto& obj : objects) {",
        "+        if (obj.objectId == objectId) {",
        "+            return &obj;",
        "+        }",
        "+    }",
        "+    return nullptr;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+bool PhysicsWorldSnapshot::RemoveObject(uint32_t objectId) {",
        "+    auto it = std::remove_if(objects.begin(), objects.end(),",
        "+        [objectId](const PhysicsObjectState& obj) {",
        "+            return obj.objectId == objectId;",
        "+        });",
        "+    ",
        "+    bool removed = (it != objects.end());",
        "+    objects.erase(it, objects.end());",
        "+    objectCount = static_cast<uint32_t>(objects.size());",
        "+    ",
        "+    return removed;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+bool PhysicsWorldSnapshot::Deserialize(const uint8_t*& data) {",
        "+    std::memcpy(&snapshotId, data, sizeof(uint32_t));",
        "+    data += sizeof(uint32_t);",
        "+    std::memcpy(&timestamp, data, sizeof(uint32_t));",
        "+    data += sizeof(uint32_t);",
        "+    std::memcpy(&objectCount, data, sizeof(uint32_t));",
        "+    data += sizeof(uint32_t);",
        "+    ",
        "+    objects.resize(objectCount);",
        "+    for (auto& obj : objects) {",
        "+        if (!obj.Deserialize(data)) {",
        "+            return false;",
        "+        }",
        "+    }",
        "+    return true;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+} // namespace PhysicsSync"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false,
  "replaceAll": false,
  "gitDiff": null
}

        "-} // namespace PhysicsSync",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @file physics_state.cpp",
        "+ * @brief 物理状态相关实现文件",
        "+ * ",
        "+ * 包含物理状态结构的辅助实现，如状态比较、校验和计算等。",
        "+ */",
        "+",
        "+#include \"physics_state.h\"",
        "+#include <cstring>",
        "+",
        "+namespace PhysicsSync {",
        "+",
        "+// =====================================================================",
        "+// PhysicsObjectState 实现",
        "+// =====================================================================",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 计算对象状态的校验和",
        "+ * @return 简单哈希值，用于快速比较两个状态是否一致",
        "+ * @note 这不是加密安全的哈希，仅用于调试和验证",
        "+ */",
        "+uint32_t PhysicsObjectState::ComputeChecksum() const {",
        "+    // 简单的累加哈希",
        "+    uint32_t hash = 0;",
        "+    ",
        "+    // 将内存内容按字节哈希",
        "+    const uint8_t* bytes = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(this);",
        "+    // 不包括sequenceNumber和flags",
        "+    size_t hashSize = offsetof(PhysicsObjectState, sequenceNumber);",
        "+    ",
        "+    for (size_t i = 0; i < hashSize; i++) {",
        "+        hash = hash * 31 + bytes[i];",
        "+    }",
        "+    ",
        "+    return hash;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 比较两个对象状态是否相等（在容差范围内）",
        "+ * @param other 要比较的状态",
        "+ * @param positionTolerance 位置容差（米）",
        "+ * @param rotationTolerance 旋转容差（弧度）",
        "+ * @param velocityTolerance 速度容差（米/秒）",
        "+ * @return 如果两个状态基本相等则返回true",
        "+ */",
        "+bool PhysicsObjectState::IsApproximatelyEqual(",
        "+    const PhysicsObjectState& other,",
        "+    float positionTolerance,",
        "+    float rotationTolerance,",
        "+    float velocityTolerance) const {",
        "+    ",
        "+    // 比较位置",
        "+    Vec3 posDiff = position - other.position;",
        "+    if (posDiff.Length() > positionTolerance) {",
        "+        return false;",
        "+    }",
        "+    ",
        "+    // 比较旋转（使用四元数点积）",
        "+    float rotationDot = std::abs(",
        "+        rotation.x * other.rotation.x +",
        "+        rotation.y * other.rotation.y +",
        "+        rotation.z * other.rotation.z +",
        "+        rotation.w * other.rotation.w);",
        "+    // 旋转差异：当点积接近1时，旋转几乎相同",
        "+    if ((1.0f - rotationDot) > rotationTolerance) {",
        "+        return false;",
        "+    }",
        "+    ",
        "+    // 比较线速度",
        "+    Vec3 velDiff = linearVelocity - other.linearVelocity;",
        "+    if (velDiff.Length() > velocityTolerance) {",
        "+        return false;",
        "+    }",
        "+    ",
        "+    // 比较角速度",
        "+    Vec3 angVelDiff = angularVelocity - other.angularVelocity;",
        "+    if (angVelDiff.Length() > velocityTolerance) {",
        "+        return false;",
        "+    }",
        "+    ",
        "+    return true;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+// =====================================================================",
        "+// Vec3 实现",
        "+// =====================================================================",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 计算向量与另一个向量之间的欧几里得距离",
        "+ */",
        "+float Vec3::DistanceTo(const Vec3& other) const {",
        "+    return (*this - other).Length();",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 对向量进行截断，限制其长度不超过最大值",
        "+ */",
        "+Vec3 Vec3::ClampLength(float maxLength) const {",
        "+    float len = Length();",
        "+    if (len > maxLength && len > 1e-8f) {",
        "+        return (*this) * (maxLength / len);",
        "+    }",
        "+    return *this;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+// =====================================================================",
        "+// Quat 实现",
        "+// =====================================================================",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 将四元数转换为轴角表示",
        "+ * @param axis 输出的旋转轴",
        "+ * @param angle 输出的旋转角度（弧度）",
        "+ */",
        "+void Quat::ToAxisAngle(Vec3& axis, float& angle) const {",
        "+    // 确保四元数是归一化的",
        "+    float len = std::sqrt(x*x + y*y + z*z + w*w);",
        "+    if (len < 1e-8f) {",
        "+        axis = Vec3::Up();",
        "+        angle = 0.0f;",
        "+        return;",
        "+    }",
        "+    ",
        "+    float norm = 1.0f / len;",
        "+    float nx = x * norm;",
        "+    float ny = y * norm;",
        "+    float nz = z * norm;",
        "+    float nw = w * norm;",
        "+    ",
        "+    // 检查是否为无效四元数",
        "+    if (nw > 1.0f) nw = 1.0f;",
        "+    if (nw < -1.0f) nw = -1.0f;",
        "+    ",
        "+    angle = 2.0f * std::acos(nw);",
        "+    ",
        "+    float sinAngle = std::sin(angle * 0.5f);",
        "+    if (sinAngle > 1e-8f) {",
        "+        axis.x = nx / sinAngle;",
        "+        axis.y = ny / sinAngle;",
        "+        axis.z = nz / sinAngle;",
        "+    } else {",
        "+        axis = Vec3::Up();",
        "+    }",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 从轴角表示构造四元数",
        "+ * @param axis 旋转轴（需要归一化）",
        "+ * @param angle 旋转角度（弧度）",
        "+ * @return 对应的四元数",
        "+ */",
        "+Quat Quat::FromAxisAngle(const Vec3& axis, float angle) {",
        "+    Quat result;",
        "+    float halfAngle = angle * 0.5f;",
        "+    float sinHalf = std::sin(halfAngle);",
        "+    ",
        "+    Vec3 normalizedAxis = axis.Normalized();",
        "+    result.x = normalizedAxis.x * sinHalf;",
        "+    result.y = normalizedAxis.y * sinHalf;",
        "+    result.z = normalizedAxis.z * sinHalf;",
        "+    result.w = std::cos(halfAngle);",
        "+    ",
        "+    return result;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 计算两个四元数之间的差异",
        "+ * @param other 目标四元数",
        "+ * @return 差异值（0表示相同，越大表示差异越大）",
        "+ */",
        "+float Quat::Difference(const Quat& other) const {",
        "+    float dot = std::abs(",
        "+        this->x * other.x +",
        "+        this->y * other.y +",
        "+        this->z * other.z +",
        "+        this->w * other.w);",
        "+    return 1.0f - dot;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+// =====================================================================",
        "+// PhysicsWorldSnapshot 实现",
        "+// =====================================================================",
        "+",
        "+/**",
        "+ * @brief 查找指定ID的对象状态",
        "+ * @param objectId 对象ID",
        "+ * @return 指向对象状态的指针，如果未找到则返回nullptr",
        "+ */",
        "+PhysicsObjectState* PhysicsWorldSnapshot::FindObject(uint32_t objectId) {",
        "+    for (auto& obj : objects) {",
        "+        if (obj.objectId == objectId) {",
        "+            return &obj;",
        "+        }",
        "+    }",
        "+    return nullptr;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+const PhysicsObjectState* PhysicsWorldSnapshot::FindObject(uint32_t objectId) const {",
        "+    for (const auto& obj : objects) {",
        "+        if (obj.objectId == objectId) {",
        "+            return &obj;",
        "+        }",
        "+    }",
        "+    return nullptr;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+bool PhysicsWorldSnapshot::RemoveObject(uint32_t objectId) {",
        "+    auto it = std::remove_if(objects.begin(), objects.end(),",
        "+        [objectId](const PhysicsObjectState& obj) {",
        "+            return obj.objectId == objectId;",
        "+        });",
        "+    ",
        "+    bool removed = (it != objects.end());",
        "+    objects.erase(it, objects.end());",
        "+    objectCount = static_cast<uint32_t>(objects.size());",
        "+    ",
        "+    return removed;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+bool PhysicsWorldSnapshot::Deserialize(const uint8_t*& data) {",
        "+    std::memcpy(&snapshotId, data, sizeof(uint32_t));",
        "+    data += sizeof(uint32_t);",
        "+    std::memcpy(&timestamp, data, sizeof(uint32_t));",
        "+    data += sizeof(uint32_t);",
        "+    std::memcpy(&objectCount, data, sizeof(uint32_t));",
        "+    data += sizeof(uint32_t);",
        "+    ",
        "+    objects.resize(objectCount);",
        "+    for (auto& obj : objects) {",
        "+        if (!obj.Deserialize(data)) {",
        "+            return false;",
        "+        }",
        "+    }",
        "+    return true;",
        "+}",
        "+",
        "+} // namespace PhysicsSync"
      ]
    }
  ],

blocks.output:

    "filePath": "\\?\D:\PhysicsSync\PhysicsSync_Claw\CMakeLists.txt",
    "content": "# 使用说明：
#   include_directories(external/JoltPhysics/Include)
#   target_link_libraries(your_target Jolt)

if(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics)
    message(STATUS "Jolt Physics found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics")
    # Jolt Physics has CMakeLists.txt in Build/ subdirectory
    add_subdirectory(${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics/Build BuildOut)
else()
    message(WARNING "Jolt Physics not found. Please clone into external/JoltPhysics")
    message(WARNING "  git clone https://github.com/jrouwe/JoltPhysics.git external/JoltPhysics")
    add_library(Jolt INTERFACE)
    add_library(Jolt::Jolt ALIAS Jolt)
endif()

# ============================================================================

blocks.text: Let me check the common CMakeLists.txt:

blocks.output:
{
  "type": "text",
  "file": {
    "filePath": "\\?\D:\PhysicsSync\PhysicsSync_Claw\src\common\CMakeLists.txt",
    "content": "# === ======================================== ========================
# src/common/CMakeLists.txt - 公共库构建配置
# === ======================================== ========================
# 公共库包含：物理状态定义、序列化、网络协议、时间步长管理、KCP封装
# === ======================================== ========================

# 公共库源文件
set(COMMON_SOURCES
    physics_state.cpp
    physics_state.h
    serializer.cpp
    serializer.h
    network_protocol.h
    network_protocol.cpp
    network_layer.h
    network_layer.cpp
    udp_socket.h
    udp_socket.cpp
    kcp_wrapper.h
    timestep_manager.cpp
    timestep_manager.h
    deterministic_random.cpp
    deterministic_random.h
)

# KCP源文件（来自third_party）
set(KCP_SOURCE
    ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp/ikcp.c
)

add_library(PhysicsSyncCommon STATIC
    ${COMMON_SOURCES}
    ${KCP_SOURCE}
)

target_include_directories(PhysicsSyncCommon
    PUBLIC
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    PRIVATE
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/..
        ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp
)

# 链接Jolt Physics（如果可用）
if(TARGET Jolt)
    target_link_libraries(PhysicsSyncCommon PUBLIC Jolt)
    message(STATUS "Jolt Physics linked to PhysicsSyncCommon")
endif()

# 编译定义
target_compile_definitions(PhysicsSyncCommon
    PRIVATE
        # Windows特定定义
        $<$<CXX_COMPILER_ID:MSVC>:
            _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS
            WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN
        >
)

# 设置目标属性
set_target_properties(PhysicsSyncCommon PROPERTIES
    CXX_STANDARD 17
    CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON
    CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF
    POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON
)

# 单元测试
if(BUILD_TESTING)
    add_executable(PhysicsSyncCommonTests
        common_tests.cpp
    )
    
    target_link_libraries(PhysicsSyncCommonTests
        PRIVATE
            PhysicsSyncCommon
            GTest::gtest
            GTest::gtest_main
    )
    
    include(GoogleTest)
    gtest_discover_tests(PhysicsSyncCommonTests)
    
    # 测试依赖
    add_dependencies(PhysicsSyncCommonTests PhysicsSyncCommon)
endif()

message(STATUS "PhysicsSyncCommon built with KCP integration")",
    "numLines": 88,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 88
  }
}

blocks.text: 链接错误是 Jolt Physics 用 MT（静态运行时）而项目用 MD（动态运行时）的冲突。修复：

blocks.input:
{"new_string":"if(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics)
    message(STATUS \"Jolt Physics found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics\")
    # Jolt Physics has CMakeLists.txt in Build/ subdirectory
    # Force consistent runtime library
    set(JOLT_BUILD_DIR ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/BuildOut)
    add_subdirectory(${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics/Build ${JOLT_BUILD_DIR})
    # Force MT/MTd runtime on Jolt
    set_target_properties(Jolt PROPERTIES
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>"
    )
else()","old_string":"if(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics)
    message(STATUS \"Jolt Physics found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics\")
    # Jolt Physics has CMakeLists.txt in Build/ subdirectory
    add_subdirectory(${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics/Build BuildOut)
else()","path":"D:\PhysicsSync\PhysicsSync_Claw\CMakeLists.txt"}

blocks.text: I need to fix the runtime library conflict. Let me add global `/MD` setting:

blocks.input:
{"new_string":"# 编译器警告
if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /utf-8)
    add_definitions(/DNOMINMAX)
    add_definitions(/D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
    # Force dynamic runtime library for all targets
    set(CMAKE_MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>DLL")
elseif(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "GNU|Clang")

  "originalFile": "# ============================================================================\n# PhysicsSync - 基于 Jolt Physics + Google Filament + KCP 的物理同步方案\n# ============================================================================\n# 项目描述：\n#   一套带渲染表现的物理同步技术方案，适用于多人在线游戏。\n#   核心架构：服务器权威 + 客户端预测与校正\n#\n# 技术栈：\n#   - 物理引擎：Jolt Physics (确定性物理模拟)\n#   - 渲染库：Google Filament (高性能实时渲染)\n#   - 网络协议：KCP (快速可靠传输协议)\n#   - 语言：C++17\n#\n# 项目结构：\n#   src/common/  - 公共代码（物理状态、序列化、网络协议、时间步长管理）\n#   src/server/  - 服务器代码（物理服务器核心）\n#   src/client/  - 客户端代码（渲染、预测校正、输入处理）\n#   external/    - 三方库\n# ============================================================================\n\ncmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)\nproject(PhysicsSync\n    VERSION 1.0.0\n    DESCRIPTION \"Physics synchronization solution with rendering\"\n    LANGUAGES C CXX\n)\n\n# ============================================================================\n# 全局编译设置\n# ============================================================================\n\n# C++17 标准\nset(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)\nset(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)\nset(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)\n\n# 输出目录\nset(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/bin)\nset(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/lib)\nset(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/lib)\n\n# 编译类型默认 Release\nif(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE)\n    set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE Release)\nendif()\n\n# 编译器警告\nif(MSVC)\n    add_compile_options(/W4 /utf-8)\n    add_definitions(/DNOMINMAX)\n    add_definitions(/D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)\nelseif(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES \"GNU|Clang\")\n    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)\nendif()\n\n# ============================================================================\n# 第三方库路径配置\n# ============================================================================\n\nset(EXTERNAL_DIR ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external)\n\n# ============================================================================\n# Jolt Physics - 物理引擎\n# ============================================================================\n# 下载地址：https://github.com/jrouwe/JoltPhysics\n#\n# 集成说明：\n#   Jolt Physics 通过 add_subdirectory 集成，使用其内置的 CMake 构建系统。\n#   需要构建为静态库，并启用多线程支持（可选）。\n#\n# 构建选项：\n#   JOLT_PHYSICS_STATIC     - 构建为静态库\n#   JOLT_PHYSICS_SHARED_LIB - 构建为动态库（默认关闭）\n#   JOLT_DEBUG_VISUALIZATION - 调试可视化（默认关闭）\n#\n# 使用说明：\n#   include_directories(external/JoltPhysics/Include)\n#   target_link_libraries(your_target Jolt)\n\nif(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics)\n    message(STATUS \"Jolt Physics found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics\")\n    # Jolt Physics has CMakeLists.txt in Build/ subdirectory\n    add_subdirectory(${EXTERNAL_DIR}/JoltPhysics/Build BuildOut)\nelse()\n    message(WARNING \"Jolt Physics not found. Please clone into external/JoltPhysics\")\n    message(WARNING \"  git clone https://github.com/jrouwe/JoltPhysics.git external/JoltPhysics\")\n    add_library(Jolt INTERFACE)\n    add_library(Jolt::Jolt ALIAS Jolt)\nendif()\n\n# ============================================================================\n# KCP - 快速可靠传输协议\n# ============================================================================\n# 下载地址：https://github.com/skywind3000/kcp\n#\n# 集成说明：\n#   KCP 是一个轻量级的快速可靠ARQ协议，基于UDP实现。\n#   本项目将其源码直接集成，通过 ikcp.h/ikcp.c 接口使用。\n#\n# 特性：\n#   - 低延迟（比TCP更快）\n#   - 可靠传输（支持ACK确认）\n#   - 流量控制（滑动窗口）\n#   - FEC前向纠错（可选）\n#\n# 使用说明：\n#   include_directories(external/kcp)\n#   target_sources(your_target PRIVATE external/kcp/ikcp.c)\n\nif(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp/ikcp.h)\n    message(STATUS \"KCP found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp\")\n    # KCP 是纯C库，直接在需要时包含其源文件\n    set(KCP_HEADER ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp/ikcp.h)\n    set(KCP_SOURCE ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp/ikcp.c)\nelse()\n    message(WARNING \"KCP not found. Please clone into external/kcp\")\n    message(WARNING \"  git clone https://github.com/skywind3000/kcp.git external/kcp\")\nendif()\n\n# ============================================================================\n# Google Filament - 高性能实时渲染引擎\n# ============================================================================\n# 下载地址：https://github.com/google/filament\n#\n# 集成说明：\n#   Filament 是 Google 开源的实时渲染引擎，支持 PBR 材质和高级光照。\n#   它是一个大型库，需要 cmake 的 subproject 方式构建。\n#\n# 前置依赖（Filament 需要）：\n#   - glslang (SPIR-V 着色器编译)\n#   - Slang (着色器编程语言)\n#   - libpng, libjpeg, zstd\n#   - nanovg, nanoprintf\n#   - tinygltf\n#\n# 构建选项：\n#   FILAMENT_ENABLE_LUNAR   - 启用 Lunar 文档工具\n#   FILAMENT_ENABLE_LOGN_16BIT_TONE_MAPPING - 启用 LogN 色调映射\n#\n# 使用说明：\n#   include_directories(external/filament/include)\n#   target_link_libraries(your_target filament engine math utils)\n\nif(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/filament)\n    message(STATUS \"Filament found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/filament\")\n    # Filament 需要特殊的构建配置，此处仅记录位置\n    # 实际使用时需要完整配置所有依赖\n    set(FILAMENT_DIR ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/filament)\nelse()\n    message(WARNING \"Filament not found. Please clone into external/filament\")\n    message(WARNING \"  git clone https://github.com/google/filament.git external/filament\")\nendif()\n\n# ============================================================================\n# Google Test (用于单元测试)\n# ============================================================================\n\noption(BUILD_TESTING \"Build unit tests\" ON)\nif(BUILD_TESTING)\n    include(FetchContent)\n    FetchContent_Declare(\n        googletest\n        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/google/googletest.git\n        GIT_TAG v1.14.0\n    )\n    # 对于 Windows，防止 GTest 覆盖我们的编译器标志\n    set(gtest_force_shared_crt ON CACHE BOOL \"\" FORCE)\n    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(googletest)\nendif()\n\n# ============================================================================\n# 添加子模块\n# ============================================================================\n\n# 公共库\nadd_subdirectory(src/common)\n\n# 服务器\nadd_subdirectory(src/server)\n\n# 客户端\nadd_subdirectory(src/client)\n\n# ============================================================================\n# 自动化测试\n# ============================================================================\n\nif(BUILD_TESTING)\n    # 创建自动化测试目标\n    add_custom_target(run_tests\n        COMMAND ${CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND} --output-on-failure -C $<CONFIG>\n        WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}\n        DEPENDS PhysicsSyncCommonTests PhysicsSyncServerTests\n        COMMENT \"Running all unit tests...\"\n    )\nendif()",

        "+#   本项目将其源码直接集成，通过 ikcp.h/ikcp.c 接口使用。",
        "+#",
        "+# 特性：",
        "+#   - 低延迟（比TCP更快）",
        "+#   - 可靠传输（支持ACK确认）",
        "+#   - 流量控制（滑动窗口）",
        "+#   - FEC前向纠错（可选）",
        "+#",
        "+# 使用说明：",
        "+#   include_directories(external/kcp)",
        "+#   target_sources(your_target PRIVATE external/kcp/ikcp.c)",
        "+",
        "+if(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp/ikcp.h)",
        "+    message(STATUS \"KCP found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp\")",
        "+    # KCP 是纯C库，直接在需要时包含其源文件",
        "+    set(KCP_HEADER ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp/ikcp.h)",
        "+    set(KCP_SOURCE ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/kcp/ikcp.c)",
        "+else()",
        "+    message(WARNING \"KCP not found. Please clone into external/kcp\")",
        "+    message(WARNING \"  git clone https://github.com/skywind3000/kcp.git external/kcp\")",
        "+endif()",
        "+",
        "+# ============================================================================",
        "+# Google Filament - 高性能实时渲染引擎",
        "+# ============================================================================",
        "+# 下载地址：https://github.com/google/filament",
        "+#",
        "+# 集成说明：",
        "+#   Filament 是 Google 开源的实时渲染引擎，支持 PBR 材质和高级光照。",
        "+#   它是一个大型库，需要 cmake 的 subproject 方式构建。",
        "+#",
        "+# 前置依赖（Filament 需要）：",
        "+#   - glslang (SPIR-V 着色器编译)",
        "+#   - Slang (着色器编程语言)",
        "+#   - libpng, libjpeg, zstd",
        "+#   - nanovg, nanoprintf",
        "+#   - tinygltf",
        "+#",
        "+# 构建选项：",
        "+#   FILAMENT_ENABLE_LUNAR   - 启用 Lunar 文档工具",
        "+#   FILAMENT_ENABLE_LOGN_16BIT_TONE_MAPPING - 启用 LogN 色调映射",
        "+#",
        "+# 使用说明：",
        "+#   include_directories(external/filament/include)",
        "+#   target_link_libraries(your_target filament engine math utils)",
        "+",
        "+if(EXISTS ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/filament)",
        "+    message(STATUS \"Filament found at: ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/filament\")",
        "+    # Filament 需要特殊的构建配置，此处仅记录位置",
        "+    # 实际使用时需要完整配置所有依赖",
        "+    set(FILAMENT_DIR ${EXTERNAL_DIR}/filament)",
        "+else()",
        "+    message(WARNING \"Filament not found. Please clone into external/filament\")",
        "+    message(WARNING \"  git clone https://github.com/google/filament.git external/filament\")",
        "+endif()",
        "+",
        "+# ============================================================================",
        "+# Google Test (用于单元测试)",
        "+# ============================================================================",
        "+",
        "+option(BUILD_TESTING \"Build unit tests\" ON)",
        "+if(BUILD_TESTING)",
        "+    include(FetchContent)",
        "+    FetchContent_Declare(",
        "+        googletest",
        "+        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/google/googletest.git",
        "+        GIT_TAG v1.14.0",
        "+    )",
        "+    # 对于 Windows，防止 GTest 覆盖我们的编译器标志",
        "+    set(gtest_force_shared_crt ON CACHE BOOL \"\" FORCE)",
        "+    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(googletest)",
        "+endif()",
        "+",
        "+# ============================================================================",
        "+# 添加子模块",
        "+# ============================================================================",
        "+",
        "+# 公共库",
        "+add_subdirectory(src/common)",
        "+",
        "+# 服务器",
        "+add_subdirectory(src/server)",
        "+",
        "+# 客户端",
        "+add_subdirectory(src/client)",
        "+",
        "+# ============================================================================",
        "+# 自动化测试",
        "+# ============================================================================",
        "+",
        "+if(BUILD_TESTING)",
        "+    # 创建自动化测试目标",
        "+    add_custom_target(run_tests",
        "+        COMMAND ${CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND} --output-on-failure -C $<CONFIG>",
        "+        WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}",
        "+        DEPENDS PhysicsSyncCommonTests PhysicsSyncServerTests",
        "+        COMMENT \"Running all unit tests...\"",
        "+    )",
        "+endif()"
      ]
    }
  ],
